currentState: Disciplined field trust hardened by disaster. Sylvanas relies on Cyndia for clean counts and clean spoor, and Cyndia keeps proving she will not overstate evidence just to match urgency.
powerDynamic: Sylvanas remains unquestioned command authority. Cyndia supplies the kind of accurate search and tracking labor that lets Sylvanas make decisions without bad assumptions.

physicalDynamics.pattern: Cyndia meets Sylvanas straight-backed despite fatigue and falls in half a step behind once command is re-established.

In chapter2 the dynamic becomes visible in action: Cyndia moves as soon as Sylvanas tilts her head, pulls the anchor stone on command, takes the left side when told, and lands the finishing shots Sylvanas calls for.
Chapter3 shows the same trust in quieter form: Cyndia appears beside Sylvanas at the churned track without being called and gives the hard limit of what the ground will support.

nameUsage.sylvanasCallsCyndia: Ranger in formal mode, with terse approval or warning built into the same tone.

history.event: Cyndia correctly predicts where Sylvanas will be found and escalates the disturbance before chamber politics can dilute it.
Sylvanas turns Cyndia from border-post officer into mounted escort with almost no transition cost, confirming long-practiced trust in the field chain.
At Millhaven Cyndia becomes Sylvanas's verification partner on the ground, counting empty homes and reading bad spoor without letting fear degrade precision.

trajectory: Professional command chain -> battle-tested field trust -> investigative trust under catastrophe.
